title: potentilla hyparctica subsp. elatior
intro: Potentilla hyparctica subsp. elatior is a subspecies of the Potentilla hyparctica plant, a flowering perennial species in the rose family native to mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla hyparctica subsp. elatior include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and immune function, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
